data.natural:
If the hiker follows the red markers on the trees, he will eventually reach the beautiful lake at the top of the mountain within two hours. A hiker named Tom started his journey this morning and has been following the red markers very carefully as he climbs higher and higher. He has been walking for over ninety minutes now and can see the reflection of the sun on some water in the distance, but he is not sure if that is the correct lake.
Tom will reach the lake at the top of the mountain within two hours.

data.natural:
For any abstract Zorg Z, if Z is completely crinkled, Z emits a loud hum. If Z emits a loud hum, Z vibrates at exactly four hundred hertz. Zorg Epsilon is completely crinkled. Zorg Omicron is perfectly smooth and not crinkled. Vibrating at exactly four hundred hertz causes nearby glass to shatter. Zorg Epsilon is placed near a fragile glass vase. A fragile glass vase is highly susceptible to acoustic resonance. Acoustic resonance amplifies sound waves significantly. Zorg Omicron is kept in a soundproof container. A soundproof container blocks all exiting auditory signals. Zorgs are theoretical constructs used in advanced acoustic modeling. Advanced acoustic modeling requires heavy computational power. Heavy computational power is provided by quantum mainframes.
Zorg Omicron vibrates at exactly four hundred hertz.
